content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed with only INR 14k headroom — no capacity for new entries per hysteresis rule. Multiple holdings are up sharply today (PNBHOUSING +10.4%, NESTLEIND +9.8%, TORNTPOWER +6.2%, HINDUNILVR +6.6%, AUBANK +5.9%, ADANIPOWER +7.4%) but all SLs are at zero — my #1 job this tick is to set protective stops on every position and lock in gains on the runners. INFY Q4 at 3:45 PM is the macro swing factor; defensive/FMCG/power rotation is on today.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 73.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entered at 81.50, CMP 77.62 (-5%). Q4 was strong (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, CASA 52.5%) and stock hit a fresh 52w high on 20-Apr at 76.95. Today's +2.75% rebound off 77.28 lows is constructive. Setting SL at 73 (just below 20-Apr open) — if PSU bank rally breaks down below that level, thesis is dead. Target 88 gives ~1.5R on remaining risk. Exit if not working in 8 sessions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 960.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 1001 (+2%) with today's +10.4% blow-off post strong Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA below 1% first time, analyst TPs Rs 1,160-1,350). Trailing SL up to 960 (below today's open 981, protects breakeven less slippage). Target 1140 (near 52w high 1142) gives 2.6R from here. Strong fundamental catalyst + multiple TP upgrades support holding for the move."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge at -0.7%. Setting wide SL at 119.50 (below SMA20 121.92 with buffer) given ETF low volatility and defensive intent. Target 135 captures continued gold strength toward the $5,000+ long-term targets. Hammer candle on 20-Apr suggests support holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1650, CMP 1706 (+4.5%) — breaking out to all-time highs today on +6.2%. Summer power theme + Nabha acquisition + JM Financial top pick. Trail SL up to 1620 (below entry/breakout base) — locks in near-breakeven. Target 1850 (consensus TPs 2000-2300) gives ~2.4R on remaining risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1350.00,
      "new_target": 1550.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1412.94, CMP 1412.50 — flat but stock exploded +9.8% today to fresh 52w high after blowout Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%, vol ~18%). SL at 1350 (~4.4% below, above today's low 1382 with buffer — tight given fresh breakout and high-beta reaction). Target 1550 for ~2R. Premium valuation is a risk but fundamental print was exceptional."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1049, CMP 1056 (+0.9%) — broke out to fresh 52w high today +5.9% on strong Q4 business update (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%). Q4 full results due week of Apr 25-27 (binary event). SL at 1010 (just below breakout level 1011 from 20-Apr high). Target 1150 gives 2R. Tight SL because earnings event risk imminent."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "new_target": 750.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Entry 681, CMP 690 (+1.1%) — breaking to fresh 52w high today with 3.7x volume. Q4 results Apr 29 imminent. SL at 655 (below 20-Apr low of 650 with buffer). Target 750 ~2.7R. Tight because of earnings event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Entry 2372, CMP 2379 (+0.3%). Jumped +6.6% today on FMCG defensive rotation. Q4 results Apr 28-30 (binary event). SL at 2290 (below 20-Apr close 2231 would be too loose, so tightened just below today's low with buffer — 2290 is 3.7% below, protecting most of today's gain). Target 2550 gives ~2R. UBS Buy reiteration + Akshaya Tritiya tailwind supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 440.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Entry 404.50, CMP 404.30 — flat. Strong FY26 capacity adds (9,619 MW), NGEL at 10 GW, summer demand tailwind. Q4 results May 15. SL at 388 (below 20-Apr low 390.65 with buffer). Target 440 ~2.2R. Nuvama top pick."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 197.00,
      "new_target": 245.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Entry 214, CMP 215.71 (+0.4%) — fresh ATH territory today +7.4%. Shooting star on 20-Apr is a caution but momentum continues. Q4 results Apr 29. SL at 197 (below 20-Apr close 200.83, gives 8% cushion — wider because of high volatility and extended rally). Target 245 gives ~2R. NOTE: Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + ADANIPOWER + NTPC) now ~17% of book — at cluster watch limit, no further adds."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "MAHABANK", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 73.00, "reasoning": "Thesis intact post strong Q4; SL set at 73 below breakout base."},
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 960.00, "reasoning": "Trailing up after +10% move to protect near-breakeven; strong TP upgrades support holding for Rs 1140."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 119.50, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; wide SL appropriate for ETF."},
    {"symbol": "TORNTPOWER", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1620.00, "reasoning": "ATH breakout; trail SL to near entry to lock gains with room for volatility."},
    {"symbol": "NESTLEIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1350.00, "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high post blowout Q4; SL below today's low with buffer."},
    {"symbol": "AUBANK", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1010.00, "reasoning": "Breakout day; earnings imminent — tight SL below breakout."},
    {"symbol": "GRANULES", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 655.00, "reasoning": "Volume breakout + Q4 imminent; SL just below recent base."},
    {"symbol": "HINDUNILVR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2290.00, "reasoning": "FMCG rotation + Q4 binary event next week; moderate SL."},
    {"symbol": "NTPC", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 388.00, "reasoning": "Summer power play; SL below 20-Apr low."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 197.00, "reasoning": "Extended rally but momentum intact; wider SL for volatility. Cluster exposure at limit."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong candidates I can't act on due to 79% deployment: DATAPATTNS (defence leader, fresh ATH, up +16.7% — too extended to chase anyway), WIPRO (buyback arb at Rs 250 has ~22% upside on accepted shares — would add if cash freed), OFSS (stock-specific Q4 catalyst), PIRAMALFIN (NBFC tailwind). Would need to close MAHABANK or trim a winner to make room. Not doing so without stronger signals. INFY Q4 at 3:45 PM will reset IT sector tone — wait for reaction before engaging IT buyback trades.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed at the 80% hard cap — zero room for new entries per hysteresis rule. Focus today is pure risk management: all 10 positions now have defined SLs and targets where previously SLs were zero (critical hygiene fix). Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + ADANIPOWER + NTPC) = ~INR 173k = ~17% of capital — at the 20% cluster warning level, no further adds to power. Financials cluster (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) = ~INR 362k = ~36% of capital — heavy concentration, monitor. Multiple earnings events next week (AUBANK Apr 25-27, HINDUNILVR Apr 28-30, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, GRANULES Apr 29, NESTLEIND dividend ex-date) — binary risk stacked. If any 2 earnings miss, expect 5-8% portfolio drawdown risk. Will reassess sizing post first earnings print."
}
